_doc: Template for per-project keyword filters. Copy this file to {project-name}.json (e.g. firstpage-test.json) and edit. Any key set to null is ignored. Delete keys you don't need — they are all optional.
_require_intents_doc: Keep a row only if it has ANY of these intents. Valid: informational, navigational, commercial, transactional, branded, local.
_exclude_intents_doc: Drop a row if it has ANY of these intents.
